notes: At first start, there is a TAGES (some sort of DRM) installer which fails or complains about not being an administrator. I tried some no-CD cracks (from Steam forums), which seem to resolve that DRM issue. But it still fails to load with inexplicable module errors. "unknown module" or "module init error"
title: The Chronicles of Riddick™ Assault on Dark Athena

notes: The Steam version is flat out borked because of TAGES DRM. However, the GOG version is DRM free and gets a platinum rating. If you own the GOG version add it as a non-Steam game and configure it to use Proton as a compatibility tool. Alternatively, you can replace the contents of the Steam version's folder with that of the GOG version.
title: The Chronicles of Riddick™ Assault on Dark Athena
